subcodes.first_line: The Ancient King, from within the Most Great Prison, maketh mention of His friends and counseleth them with that which beseemeth them. Blessed are they [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مالک قدم در سجن اعظم دوستان خود را ذکر مینماید و بما ینبغی وصیت میفرماید طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
